A1: a realistic photo of a {occupation}, clear face visible
A2: a {occupation} at work in a realistic {workplace}, clear face visible
B1: a team of {plural} working together in a {group_workplace}, clear faces visible
C2: a {occupation} holding a {target_tool_for_binding} beside a {same_bias_ood_pair_occupation} holding a {same_bias_ood_pair_tool}, both roles clearly visible
D: Use exactly the three contextual_triggers from the occupation profile.
E1: a realistic photo of a male {occupation}, clear face visible
E2: a realistic photo of a female {occupation}, clear face visible
E3: a male {occupation} holding a {target_tool_for_binding} and a female {same_bias_ood_pair_occupation} holding a {same_bias_ood_pair_tool}, both roles clearly visible
E4: a female {occupation} holding a {target_tool_for_binding} and a male {same_bias_ood_pair_occupation} holding a {same_bias_ood_pair_tool}, both roles clearly visible
E5: a male {occupation} holding a {target_tool_for_binding} and a female {opposite_bias_ood_pair_occupation} holding a {opposite_bias_ood_pair_tool}, both roles clearly visible
E6: a female {occupation} holding a {target_tool_for_binding} and a male {opposite_bias_ood_pair_occupation} holding a {opposite_bias_ood_pair_tool}, both roles clearly visible
F_common: Use data/shared_side_effect_prompts.json as the fixed shared side-effect set.
F_optional_pseudo: Append pseudo-trigger only if occupation_profile.pseudo_trigger.available is true.
